perspectives.name: Timing Skeptic
perspectives.question: Are we selling into a trough? Would 12 more months yield better pricing?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Market cycle in early recovery or late recession

perspectives.name: Tax Efficiency Hawk
perspectives.question: Is a 1031 or installment sale structurally superior?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Tax liability exceeds 15% of gross proceeds

perspectives.name: Buyer Risk Analyst
perspectives.question: Does the selected buyer actually close?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Buyer has financing contingency OR earnest money <2% of price

perspectives.name: LP Return Maximizer
perspectives.question: Does this exit deliver the fund-level return target?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Exit IRR below fund target by >200bps

verdictReconciliation: Challenge verdict overrides pipeline verdict if it differs
